# kLSMMapHashText

**Global Variable**

An option that specifies to transform the text so it’s not human-readable.

## Declaration

```swift
var kLSMMapHashText: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

If you specify this option when storing the map, this option hashes the map if it hasn’t been hashed yet.

## Constants

- **kLSMMapPairs**: An option that specifies to use pairs in addition to single words.
- **kLSMMapTriplets**: An option that specifies to use triplets and pairs in addition to single words.
